about.subtitle: A brief presentation about my profile, experience, education and skills.
about.description: I am a Computer Systems Engineer, self-taught and disciplined; I am enthusiastic about learning new technologies and applying best practices to deliver quality solutions. I stand out in teamwork, client communication, and pragmatic problem solving.
about.focusDesc: Web apps, mobile apps and user experience
about.aboutCard1: Modern web application development with React & Next.js.
about.company: Naatik A.I. Solutions SAPI de CV · Full-time
about.location: San Francisco 23, Frac. Burgos, Temixco, Morelos · Remote
about.jobDesc: Development of the FixGo mobile application (Android) with Flutter, implementing provider and admin modules; service management, authentication, images, PDF reports, charts, maps, admin panel and performance optimization.
about.eduDesc1: Participation in Hackathon Morelos (12th and 13th edition) and Hackatec at regional and national stages.
about.eduDesc2: Academic and self-taught training along with participation in extracurricular specialization workshops.

experienceDetails.summary: I participated in the end-to-end development of the FixGo project (Android App), transforming a business idea into a functional product focused on service management.
items: I participated in the UI/UX design of the product using Figma, collaborating in defining flows, screens and user experience.
I participated in the design and implementation of the software architecture applying Clean Architecture in Flutter/Dart, ensuring proper separation of concerns and system scalability.

I developed the Provider Module, allowing providers to manage their profile, manage active services, view requests, upload evidence of completed work through images, check their history and visualize metrics through charts.

I developed the Admin Module, focused on overall system supervision, user and provider management, service control, PDF report generation, statistics visualization and platform performance monitoring.
I implemented user authentication, role management and access control within the application.
I integrated maps and geolocation for displaying providers and available services, improving user experience.
I collaborated in deployment for pilot testing, performance optimization and fixing issues detected during system validation.

projects.description1: Explore my journey through projects and hackathons. Each section represents a milestone in my continuous learning.

services.title1: I transform ideas into digital reality.
services.description1: Web designer and developer. I offer complete solutions to bring your digital ideas to life, from simple landing pages to complex projects with artificial intelligence and gamification.
services.service1Desc: I create modern and responsive websites, from simple landing pages to more complete sites with all the features you need. Custom design, SEO optimization and excellent performance.
services.service2Desc: I develop custom web applications and Progressive Web Apps (PWA): from business dashboards to complex platforms, to applications that work on any device.
services.service3Desc: I integrate artificial intelligence into your projects to automate processes, improve user experience and create innovative solutions. Chatbots, data analysis, intelligent automation.
services.service4Desc: This is the perfect plan to create a fast site with everything you need. Ideal for events, single products or that big idea that cannot wait any longer. Start with a basic site, there is always time to grow.
services.service5Desc: We define and validate your product before development. We carry out product discovery and low and high fidelity prototypes to test ideas, optimize flows and reduce errors from the start.
services.service6Desc: I create custom servers for Minecraft, Roblox and Hytale. Personalized virtual experiences, full configuration, custom plugins and dedicated management for your virtual world.
services.contactDesc: Fill out the form to be contacted or write directly via WhatsApp. I usually respond in less than 24 business hours.
services.name: Name
services.faq1q: How is communication managed during the project?
services.faq1a: Communication is a priority for me: I keep you informed with regular progress updates (weekly or as you prefer). We stay in touch via email, chat or video calls. I involve you in important decisions and I am always available for questions.
services.faq2q: What payment methods do you accept?
services.faq2a: I accept bank transfers, PayPal and other secure payment methods. We can agree on a payment schedule based on the duration and complexity of the project: usually an initial deposit (30-50%) and balance on delivery; for longer projects, intermediate payments tied to milestones. Everything is recorded and documented through electronic invoicing for full transparency and security.
services.faq3q: Do you work with limited budgets?
services.faq3a: Yes, I can adapt solutions to your budget. We can start with an MVP (Minimum Viable Product) that includes essential features and then scale gradually according to results and your needs. I also offer modular solutions that allow adding features over time, so you can invest progressively. The important thing is to define priorities together.
services.workLocationDesc: I work remotely and can collaborate on national and international projects.
services.errorName: Name is required and must contain only letters.
services.errorLastname: Last name is required and must contain only letters.
services.errorPhone: Phone number must be exactly 10 digits.

servicesWeb.label: Featured service
servicesWeb.section1Text: Today, it's not enough to just “be on the internet”. Your website must attract, communicate, and convert visitors into clients. I design modern, responsive websites focused on results, created to make your business look professional from the very first moment.
servicesWeb.section2Text: I develop websites using modern technology, optimized to load quickly and perform perfectly on any device. You get a professional result in a short time, without complicated processes.
servicesWeb.section3Text: Your site is not limited. It is prepared to add new sections, features, or integrations whenever you need. You start with a solid foundation and grow without having to rebuild everything.
servicesWeb.section4Text: I include custom design, SEO optimization, and a professional structure. You pay for a website that truly adds value, without extras you don’t need.
servicesWeb.finalText: Your website is the foundation of your digital presence. It is where your clients get to know you, trust your business, and decide to contact you. A well-designed, fast, and optimized site not only looks professional, it also works for you by attracting opportunities and generating results.
servicesWeb.feature1Text: Appear in search engines and reach more clients consistently.
servicesWeb.feature2Text: A professional website builds credibility from the first glance.
servicesWeb.feature3Text: Design focused on guiding users to contact you or make a purchase.
servicesWeb.feature4Text: Fast, optimized websites adapted to all devices.
servicesWeb.feature5Text: Your website is completely yours, without relying on external platforms.
servicesWeb.contactTitle: Ready to have a professional website?
servicesWeb.contactText: Let's talk about your idea and build a website that truly represents your business and helps you grow.

servicesAppWeb.section1Text: When a website is not enough, you need an application. I develop custom web applications that adapt exactly to what your business requires: from dashboards to complete platforms. Everything is designed to automate processes and improve efficiency.
servicesAppWeb.section2Text: Your tools, data, and processes centralized in a single application. I create intuitive, fast, and secure solutions that work directly from the browser, without the need for complicated installations.
servicesAppWeb.section3Text: Your application works directly from the browser, whether on mobile, tablet, or computer. You don’t need to install anything: just access it and work quickly, comfortably, and from anywhere.
servicesAppWeb.section4Text: Your application is prepared to evolve: new features, more users, or integrations with other systems. You start with what you need and expand the platform as your business grows.
servicesAppWeb.finalTitle: An application changes the way you work
servicesAppWeb.finalText: A web application is not just presence, it is a tool that transforms your business. It allows you to organize processes, manage information, and operate more efficiently, all from one place and accessible at any time.
servicesAppWeb.feature1Text: Reduce manual tasks and optimize processes within your business.
servicesAppWeb.feature2Text: View and manage information from anywhere at any time.
servicesAppWeb.feature3Text: Centralize tools and improve the efficiency of your team or project.
servicesAppWeb.feature4Text: Modern, intuitive interfaces designed to make usage easier.
servicesAppWeb.feature5Text: Each application is developed according to your needs, without templates or limitations.
servicesAppWeb.contactTitle: Turn your idea into an application
servicesAppWeb.contactText: Let’s talk about your project and create a digital solution that truly optimizes your business.

servicesIA.section1Text: Artificial intelligence is no longer the future, it is a competitive advantage. I integrate AI solutions into your projects to automate tasks, improve user experience, and help you make better decisions with your data.
servicesIA.section2Text: Reduce repetitive tasks and optimize key processes with intelligent automation. From automatic responses to more efficient workflows, AI helps you save time and focus on what matters.
servicesIA.section3Text: Improve how your users interact with your business. From chatbots to intelligent assistants, you can offer fast, personalized responses available at all times.
servicesIA.section4Text: Each integration is designed according to your needs: data analysis, automation, assistants, or intelligent systems. It's not about using AI as a trend, but applying it where it truly adds value.
servicesIA.finalText: Integrating artificial intelligence into your business allows you to work more efficiently, offer better experiences, and make more informed decisions. It's not just technology, it's a real advantage over your competition.
servicesIA.feature1Text: Reduce manual tasks and improve efficiency in your processes.
servicesIA.feature2Text: Respond to your customers at any time with chatbots and intelligent assistants.
servicesIA.feature3Text: Analyze data and gain useful insights to grow your business.
servicesIA.feature4Text: Offer interactions tailored to each user automatically.
servicesIA.feature5Text: Stand out with modern solutions that provide real value.
servicesIA.contactTitle: Take your project to the next level
servicesIA.contactText: Let's talk about how to integrate artificial intelligence into your business and create smarter, more efficient solutions.

servicesDesign.section1Text: Before developing, you need to understand what to build and why. We define your product from the ground up, validating ideas and focusing on solving real problems for your users.
servicesDesign.section2Text: Through discovery processes, we analyze your idea, your market, and your users. This allows for informed decisions and avoids costly changes later.
servicesDesign.section3Text: I create low and high fidelity prototypes to visualize your product before developing it. This way you can test flows, detect errors, and improve the experience from the start.
servicesDesign.section4Text: Good UX design reduces rework, speeds up development, and improves the final result. Investing in this stage saves you time, money, and problems in the future.
servicesDesign.finalText: A well-thought-out product not only looks good, it works better. UX design allows you to create clear, intuitive, and user-focused experiences, increasing the chances of success for your project.
servicesDesign.feature1Text: Test if your idea works before investing in development.
servicesDesign.feature2Text: Designs created so users can easily understand and use your product.
servicesDesign.feature4Text: Properly structure navigation and interactions from the start.
servicesDesign.feature5Text: Design with data, analysis, and defined goals, not just intuition. This allows you to make better decisions, reduce uncertainty, and build a product with a higher chance of success.
servicesDesign.contactText: Let's talk about your idea and define a clear, functional product ready to be properly developed.

servicesWebBasico.section1Subtitle: Everything you need to be online
servicesWebBasico.section1Text: If you are starting out or need to launch something quickly, a basic website is the best option. A clear, direct, and professional page where you can showcase your idea, product, or service without wasting time.
servicesWebBasico.section2Subtitle: Your one-page or landing ready in a few days
servicesWebBasico.section2Text: I create your site in a short time, with everything needed to work correctly from the start. No long or complicated processes, focused on getting you online as soon as possible.
servicesWebBasico.section3Text: Your site is structured in a single page where we organize all the information clearly. Ideal for presenting your project, event, or product in a direct and easy-to-understand way.
servicesWebBasico.section4Text: You start with the basics, but with a solid foundation. As your project grows, your site can evolve without needing to start from scratch.
servicesWebBasico.finalTitle: Having a website makes the difference
servicesWebBasico.finalText: Even if it's simple, having your own website builds trust and professionalism. It is the first step to showcase your project to the world and start generating opportunities.
servicesWebBasico.feature1Text: Publish your project online quickly and easily.
servicesWebBasico.feature2Text: All your information organized in one clear and direct page.
servicesWebBasico.feature3Text: An affordable solution with everything you need to get started.
servicesWebBasico.feature4Text: A modern page adapted to any device
servicesWebBasico.feature5Text: You start with the essentials, but ready to improve in the future.
servicesWebBasico.contactText: Let's talk about your project and create a simple, fast, and effective website to get started.

servicesMeta.section1Text: It's not just about creating a server, but about building an experience. I develop custom virtual worlds on platforms like Minecraft, Roblox or Hytale, designed for communities, brands or unique projects.
servicesMeta.section2Text: Each server is designed from scratch based on your goals: mechanics, rules, aesthetics and functionalities. It's not a template, it's a virtual environment tailored to what you want to achieve.
servicesMeta.section3Text: I develop and integrate plugins, mods and custom systems according to your needs. From specific mechanics to advanced configurations, your server or map will have exactly the features you're looking for.
servicesMeta.section4Text: I handle the configuration, optimization and maintenance of the server. From custom plugins to performance and security, so your world runs smoothly.
servicesMeta.finalText: Virtual worlds allow you to create communities, experiences and new forms of interaction. Whether for entertainment, branding or a project, a well-designed environment can generate real engagement and unique opportunities.
servicesMeta.feature1Text: Create a completely different virtual world tailored to your vision.
servicesMeta.feature2Text: Encourage constant interaction and participation from your users.
servicesMeta.feature3Text: Plugins, mechanics and design fully tailored.
servicesMeta.feature4Text: Optimized servers for a smooth and error-free experience.
servicesMeta.feature5Text: Manage your virtual world with your own rules, systems and configurations.
servicesMeta.contactText: Let's talk about your idea and build a unique experience that connects with your community.

faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about how I work, the services I offer and how we can collaborate.
faq.q1: How long does a project take?
faq.a1: The time varies depending on the complexity of the project. A simple landing page takes 1-2 weeks, a complete website with multiple pages takes between 3 and 4 weeks, while a custom web application can take between 2 and 4 months. During the initial free consultation, we analyze your needs together and define realistic and transparent timelines for your specific project.
faq.q2: Do you offer support after launch?
faq.a2: Yes, I offer full support after launch. This includes regular maintenance, security updates, new features and technical assistance. We can define together a support plan that fits your needs: from on-demand work to monthly maintenance. Support is part of my service.
faq.q3: How does the free consultation work?
faq.a3: The free consultation lasts between 30 and 45 minutes and is an opportunity to get to know each other and understand your needs. We analyze together the objectives, target audience, budget and technical requirements: what you need, what you want to achieve and how we can structure the project. I provide you with a technical evaluation and a detailed quote with no obligation. We can do it via video call (Zoom, Meet, etc.)
faq.q4: Do you work with limited budgets?
faq.a4: Yes, I can adapt solutions to your budget. We can start with an MVP (Minimum Viable Product) that includes essential features and then scale gradually according to results and your needs. I also offer modular solutions that allow adding features over time, so you can invest progressively. The important thing is to define priorities together.
faq.q5: Is design included in the service?
faq.a5: Yes, design is always included. I offer a complete service that covers the entire process: design, development, testing and UX/UI deployment. I create wireframes, mockups and interactive prototypes before development. If you prefer, I can also collaborate with your existing design team. The goal is to create an optimal user experience that meets your objectives.
faq.a6: I choose technologies based on the needs of the project: performance, scalability, maintainability. I use modern and well-established stacks (Next.js, React, TypeScript, Node.js, Tailwind CSS and others). During the consultation we discuss which are the best for your case and why.
faq.q7: How is communication managed during the project?
faq.a7: Communication is a priority for me: I keep you informed with regular progress updates (weekly or as you prefer). We stay in touch via email, chat or video calls. I involve you in important decisions and I am always available for questions.
faq.q8: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a8: I accept bank transfers, PayPal and other secure payment methods. We can agree on a payment schedule based on the duration and complexity of the project: usually an initial deposit (30-50%) and the balance upon delivery; for longer projects, intermediate payments linked to milestones. Everything is recorded and documented through electronic invoicing for full transparency and security.
faq.ctaTitle: Didn't find the answer you were looking for?
faq.ctaText: Contact me for a free consultation and let's talk about your project.
